name: Checkered with Flower Embroidery Kids' Decorative Pillow - Pillowfort™
description: Add a pop of color to your kids' room with this Kids' Decorative Pillow from Pillowfort™. This yellow pillow is made from 100% cotton with polyester filling for cozy comfort. Designed in a rectangular shape, this pillow adorns colorful embroidered flowers on a checkered pattern and pink tassels at the corners for a fun look. Suitable for indoor use, this decorative pillow has a sewn-seam closure that gives it a polished appearance.
